result_text:
=== MonoidHom.coe_comp (20 matches) ===

вҖў OrderAddMonoidHom.coe_comp [theorem]
  вҲҖ {Оұ : Type u_2} {ОІ : Type u_3} {Оі : Type u_4} [inst : Preorder Оұ] [inst_1 : Preorder ОІ] [inst_2 : Preorder Оі]
  [inst_3 : AddZeroClass Оұ] [inst_4 : AddZeroClass ОІ] [inst_5 : AddZeroClass Оі] (f : ОІ вҶ’+o Оі) (g : Оұ вҶ’+o ОІ),
  вҮ‘(f.comp g) = вҮ‘f вҲҳ вҮ‘g

вҖў AddHom.coe_comp [theorem]
  вҲҖ {M : Type u_4} {N : Type u_5} {P : Type u_6} [inst : Add M] [inst_1 : Add N] [inst_2 : Add P] (g : N вҶ’вӮҷ+ P)
  (f : M вҶ’вӮҷ+ N), вҮ‘(g.comp f) = вҮ‘g вҲҳ вҮ‘f

вҖў ContinuousAddMonoidHom.coe_comp [theorem]
  вҲҖ {A : Type u_2} {B : Type u_3} {C : Type u_4} [inst : AddMonoid A] [inst_1 : AddMonoid B] [inst_2 : AddMonoid C]
  [inst_3 : TopologicalSpace A] [inst_4 : TopologicalSpace B] [inst_5 : TopologicalSpace C] (g : B вҶ’вӮң+ C) (f : A вҶ’вӮң+ B),
  вҮ‘(g.comp f) = вҮ‘g вҲҳ вҮ‘f

вҖў CommMonCat.coe_comp [theorem]
  {X Y Z : CommMonCat} {f : X вҹ¶ Y} {g : Y вҹ¶ Z} : (f вү« g : X вҶ’ Z) = g вҲҳ f

вҖў MonoidHom.complвӮӮ [definition]
  [MulOneClass M] [MulOneClass N] [CommMonoid P] [MulOneClass Q] (f : M вҶ’* N вҶ’* P) (g : Q вҶ’* N) : M вҶ’* Q вҶ’* P

вҖў MonoidHom.coe_compAddChar [theorem]
  {N : Type*} [Monoid N] (f : M вҶ’* N) (ПҶ : AddChar A M) : f.compAddChar ПҶ = f вҲҳ ПҶ

вҖў MonoidWithZeroHom.comp [definition]
  (hnp : ОІ вҶ’*вӮҖ Оі) (hmn : Оұ вҶ’*вӮҖ ОІ) : Оұ вҶ’*вӮҖ Оі

вҖў MulHom.comp [definition]
  [Mul M] [Mul N] [Mul P] (hnp : N вҶ’вӮҷ* P) (hmn : M вҶ’вӮҷ* N) : M вҶ’вӮҷ* P

вҖў MonCat.hom_comp [theorem]
  {M N T : MonCat} (f : M вҹ¶ N) (g : N вҹ¶ T) : (f вү« g).hom = g.hom.comp f.hom

вҖў MonoidHom.comprвӮӮ [definition]
  [MulOneClass M] [MulOneClass N] [CommMonoid P] [CommMonoid Q] (f : M вҶ’* N вҶ’* P) (g : P вҶ’* Q) : M вҶ’* N вҶ’* Q

вҖў MonCat.ofHom_comp [theorem]
  {M N P : Type u} [Monoid M] [Monoid N] [Monoid P] (f : M вҶ’* N) (g : N вҶ’* P) : ofHom (g.comp f) = ofHom f вү« ofHom g

вҖў MonoidHom.CompTriple.comp_eq [theorem]
  вҲҖ {M : Type u_1} {N : Type u_2} {P : Type u_3} {inst : Monoid M} {inst_1 : Monoid N} {inst_2 : Monoid P} {ПҶ : M вҶ’* N}
  {ПҲ : N вҶ’* P} {ПҮ : outParam (M вҶ’* P)} [self : ПҶ.CompTriple ПҲ ПҮ], ПҲ.comp ПҶ = ПҮ

вҖў AddMonoidHom.compHom [definition]
  {M : Type uM} вҶ’
  {N : Type uN} вҶ’
    {P : Type uP} вҶ’
      [inst : AddZeroClass M] вҶ’ [inst_1 : AddCommMonoid N] вҶ’ [inst_2 : AddCommMonoid P] вҶ’ (N вҶ’+ P) вҶ’+ (M вҶ’+ N) вҶ’+ M вҶ’+ P

вҖў CentroidHom.coe_comp_addMonoidHom [theorem]
  (g f : CentroidHom Оұ) : (g.comp f : Оұ вҶ’+ Оұ) = (g : Оұ вҶ’+ Оұ).comp f

вҖў AddMonoidHom.compHom' [definition]
  {M : Type uM} вҶ’
  {N : Type uN} вҶ’
    {P : Type uP} вҶ’
      [inst : AddZeroClass M] вҶ’ [inst_1 : AddZeroClass N] вҶ’ [inst_2 : AddCommMonoid P] вҶ’ (M вҶ’+ N) вҶ’ (N вҶ’+ P) вҶ’+ M вҶ’+ P

вҖў MonoidHom.compLeft_apply [theorem]
  вҲҖ {Оұ : Type u_4} {ОІ : Type u_5} [inst : MulOneClass Оұ] [inst_1 : MulOneClass ОІ] (f : Оұ вҶ’* ОІ) (I : Type u_6) (h : I вҶ’ Оұ)
  (a : I), (f.compLeft I) h a = (вҮ‘f вҲҳ h) a

вҖў instCoeTCMonoidHomOfMonoidHomClass [instance]
  [MonoidHomClass F M N] : CoeTC F (M вҶ’* N)

вҖў WithOne.mapMulHom_comp [theorem]
  (f : Оұ вҶ’вӮҷ* ОІ) (g : ОІ вҶ’вӮҷ* Оі) : mapMulHom (g.comp f) = (mapMulHom g).comp (mapMulHom f)

вҖў MulHom.coeFn [definition]
  (Оұ ОІ : Type*) [Mul Оұ] [CommSemigroup ОІ] : (Оұ вҶ’вӮҷ* ОІ) вҶ’вӮҷ* Оұ вҶ’ ОІ

вҖў MonCat.comp_apply [theorem]
  {M N T : MonCat} (f : M вҹ¶ N) (g : N вҹ¶ T) (x : M) : (f вү« g) x = g (f x)
